name: Teriyaki Wing Dings
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wing tips and cut at joints.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl; mix well. Add chicken and stir to coat evenly. Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Arrange the chicken on a rack in an aluminum foil-lined shallow baking pan.
5. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, basting with marinade every few minutes.
6. Let leftovers cool and refrigerate. Enjoy!
